children.heading: Prohibition of public officials and public authorities from imposition of certain requirements contrary to religious beliefs or moral convictions
children.label: b Prohibition of public officials and public authorities from imposition of certain requirements contrary to religious beliefs or moral convictions

children.text: such individual to perform or assist in the performance of any sterilization procedure or abortion if his performance or assistance in the performance of such procedure or abortion would be contrary to his religious beliefs or moral convictions; or

children.label: A
children.text: make its facilities available for the performance of any sterilization procedure or abortion if the performance of such procedure or abortion in such facilities is prohibited by the entity on the basis of religious beliefs or moral convictions, or

children.label: B
children.text: provide any personnel for the performance or assistance in the performance of any sterilization procedure or abortion if the performance or assistance in the performance of such procedures or abortion by such personnel would be contrary to the religious beliefs or moral convictions of such personnel.

children.label: A
children.text: discriminate in the employment, promotion, or termination of employment of any physician or other health care personnel, or

children.label: B
children.text: discriminate in the extension of staff or other privileges to any physician or other health care personnel,

children.label: A
children.text: discriminate in the employment, promotion, or termination of employment of any physician or other health care personnel, or

children.label: B
children.text: discriminate in the extension of staff or other privileges to any physician or other health care personnel,

children.heading: Individual rights respecting certain requirements contrary to religious beliefs or moral convictions
children.label: d Individual rights respecting certain requirements contrary to religious beliefs or moral convictions
children.text: No individual shall be required to perform or assist in the performance of any part of a health service program or research activity funded in whole or in part under a program administered by the Secretary of Health and Human Services if his performance or assistance in the performance of such part of such program or activity would be contrary to his religious beliefs or moral convictions.

children.heading: Prohibition on entities receiving Federal grant, etc., from discriminating against applicants for training or study because of refusal of applicant to participate on religious or moral grounds
children.label: e Prohibition on entities receiving Federal grant, etc., from discriminating against applicants for training or study because of refusal of applicant to participate on religious or moral grounds
children.text: No entity which receives, after , any grant, contract, loan, loan guarantee, or interest subsidy under the Public Health Service Act [ et seq.], the Community Mental Health Centers Act [ et seq.], or the Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act of 2000 [ et seq.] may deny admission or otherwise discriminate against any applicant (including applicants for internships and residencies) for training or study because of the applicant’s reluctance, or willingness, to counsel, suggest, recommend, assist, or in any way participate in the performance of abortions or sterilizations contrary to or consistent with the applicant’s religious beliefs or moral convictions.September 29, 197942 U.S.C. 20142 U.S.C. 268942 U.S.C. 15001
